emergency_definition: calls from the property manager or someone calling on behalf of the properties managed by G&M Pressure Washing, specifically gas stations
integration_constraints: Vendor will use the client company's website to train the AI agent.
after_hours_flow_summary: Non‑emergency after‑hours calls will be handled by having the caller leave a message, which will be returned the next business day.
office_hours_flow_summary: Calls are answered by the AI agent; emergency calls are routed directly to the client Ben.
questions_or_unknowns: Phone number for routing emergency calls
notes: Primary emergency contact is property manager Shelly, who manages properties including Chevron and Essos gas stations.
